scripts.db:pull: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db pull
scripts.db:studio: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db studio
scripts.db:migrate: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db db-migrate
scripts.db:update:local: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db sync:prod-to-local
scripts.db:update:local:dry-run: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db sync:prod-to-local:dry-run
scripts.db:update:local:reset: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db sync:prod-to-local --reset-cursor
scripts.db:sync:prod-to-local: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db sync:prod-to-local
scripts.db:sync:prod-to-local:dry-run: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db sync:prod-to-local:dry-run
scripts.db:sync:prod-to-local:table: bun run db:start && bun --cwd packages/db sync:prod-to-local:table
scripts.db:shell: bun run db:start && docker compose exec postgres psql -U postgres -d school_clerk
scripts.dev:prepare: bun run kill:ports && bun run db:start
scripts.dev: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --parallel
scripts.dev:api: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --filter=@school-clerk/api
scripts.dev:dashboard: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --filter=@school-clerk/dashboard
scripts.dev:dashboard:full: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --filter=@school-clerk/dashboard --filter=@school-clerk/api
scripts.dev:site: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --filter=@school-clerk/site
scripts.dev:school-site: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --filter=@school-clerk/school-site
scripts.dev:websites: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --filter=@school-clerk/dashboard --filter=@school-clerk/site --filter=@school-clerk/school-site --filter=@school-clerk/jobs
scripts.dev2: bun run dev:prepare && SCHOOL_CLERK_DB_STARTED=1 turbo dev --parallel --filter !@school-clerk/jobs --filter  !@school-clerk/api --filter !@school-clerk/site
